GREEK

1. A1 Foundations & Survival

1.1. Unit 1: The Greek Alphabet → 1.2. Unit 2: The Basics of Nouns → 1.3. Unit 3: Being & Having → 1.4. Unit 4: Intro to Verbs (Type A) → 1.5. Unit 5: The Accusative Case → 1.6. Unit 6: Adjectives & Agreement → 1.7. Unit 7: Asking Questions →

2. A2 Expansion & Daily Life

2.1. Unit 8: Plural Nouns & Adjectives → 2.2. Unit 9: Verb Groups B1 & B2 → 2.3. Unit 10: Aspect & Subjunctive → 2.4. Unit 11: Future Tenses (Θα) → 2.5. Unit 12: Building the Simple Stem → 2.6. Unit 13: Object Pronouns → 2.7. Unit 14: The Past Tenses →

3. B1 Intermediate Grammar

3.1. Unit 15: Genitive Case → 3.2. Unit 16: Imperative Mood → 3.3. Unit 17: Adverbs & Manner → 3.4. Unit 18: Passive & Deponent Verbs → 3.5. Unit 19: Voices & Moods Review → 3.6. Unit 20: The Perfect Tenses → 3.7. Unit 21: Conditionals (If Clauses) →

4. B2 Advanced Fluency

4.1. Unit 22: Spoken Expressions → 4.2. Unit 23: Relative Pronouns → 4.3. Unit 24: Reflexive Pronouns → 4.4. Unit 25: Adjective Comparison → 4.5. Unit 26: Participles → 4.6. Unit 27: Impersonal Verbs → 4.7. Unit 28: Idioms & Remnants →

5. C1 Advanced syntax

5.1. Unit 29: Diminutives → 5.2. Unit 30: Compound Words →

6. C2 Mastery

6.1. Unit 31: Ancient Remnants → 6.2. Unit 32: Genitive Absolute → 6.3. Unit 33: Irregular Words →
